kw.name: New Browser

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'moikaikki' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '12345678' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'text=Login >> nth=1'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Logout at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.msg: Clicks the element 'a[href="paivakirja.html"]'.

kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[type="submit"]'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
